name: Kobalt Music Royalty Management API
what_it_does: Kobalt Music KORE (Kobalt Optimised Royalty Engine) platform REST API for music royalty collection, publishing administration, and rights management for songwriters, producers, and music publishers. Enables AI agents to manage music copyright registration and territory-by-territory rights tracking for global publishing administration automation, handle royalty statement ingestion and normalization from performing rights organizations (PROs) for multi-source royalty collection automation, access songwriter and producer royalty calculation and payment for rights holder payment automation, retrieve music usage data and sync licensing for composition placement tracking automation, manage mechanical royalty collection from digital service providers (DSPs) for streaming royalty automation, handle neighboring rights registration and collection for master rights royalty automation, access real-time royalty data dashboard and earnings tracking for rights holder portfolio automation, retrieve music catalog metadata and ISRC/ISWC management for music rights database automation, manage sub-publisher and co-publishing agreement administration for publishing deal automation, and integrate Kobalt KORE with DSPs, PROs (ASCAP, BMI, SESAC, PRS), and music distribution platforms for end-to-end royalty lifecycle management.
use_cases: Tracking music royalties from publishing administration agents
Normalizing PRO statements from royalty collection agents
Paying songwriters from rights holder payment agents
Managing sync licenses from music placement agents
not_for: Music distribution and release delivery (use DistroKid or TuneCore)
Record label A&R and artist development
best_when: A music publisher, songwriter, producer, or rights management company wanting AI agents to automate royalty collection, PRO statement processing, rights holder payments, and music catalog management within Kobalt's KORE publishing administration platform.
avoid_when: SONGWRITER ROYALTY CALCULATION SPLIT ACCURACY: Automated royalty split calculation via Kobalt KORE for co-written compositions must apply exact copyright split percentages as documented in publisher agreement; automated royalty calculation with incorrect split data creates underpayment or overpayment disputes between co-writers; validate split data against executed publishing agreement before automated royalty calculation. PRO STATEMENT NORMALIZATION METADATA ACCURACY: Automated PRO statement ingestion via Kobalt must match performance data to correct composition ISWC; automated matching errors for compositions with similar titles or multiple versions (remixes, translations) create royalty misattribution; implement manual review gate for low-confidence ISWC matching. DIGITAL MECHANICAL RATE ACCURACY FOR STREAMING: Automated mechanical royalty calculation for streaming platforms must apply current Copyright Royalty Board (CRB) streaming mechanical rates; CRB rates are subject to Phonorecords rulemaking proceedings and appeal; automated rate calculation using prior-period rates without CRB update validation creates under or over payment of mechanical royalties.

auth.notes: Kobalt uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ with offices in New York, Los Angeles, Nashville. Founded 2000 by Willard Ahdritz. Private ($700M+ raised, Google Ventures, Francisco Partners, OMERS). 1.8M+ song catalog. KORE proprietary royalty technology platform. 25% of top 100 US singles represented. Songwriters include Paul McCartney, Foo Fighters, Lorde, The Weeknd (historically). Publishing administration, neighboring rights, sync licensing. Competes with Universal Music Publishing, Sony Music Publishing, Warner Chappell, and Downtown Music for independent music publishing administration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — publishing administration agreement with commission-based royalty fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Commission-based royalty administration (typically 10-15% of collected royalties); API access for enterprise publisher clients; direct licensing and sync fee management
pricing.notes: London UK. Private ($700M+ raised). Founded 2000. Commission-based royalty administration fee. API access for enterprise publisher accounts. 1.8M+ song catalog administered.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; catalog and royalty queries throttled; webhooks for payment and statement events

known_agent_gotchas: PRO STATEMENT PROCESSING LAG AND PAYMENT TIMING: Kobalt PRO royalty statements are processed quarterly to semi-annually depending on PRO and territory; automated royalty reconciliation must account for multi-quarter lag between music performance and statement receipt; do not assume real-time royalty visibility for streaming and broadcast usage

ISWC MATCHING CONFIDENCE FOR ROYALTY ATTRIBUTION: Automated PRO statement ingestion requires ISWC (International Standard Musical Work Code) matching for royalty attribution; compositions without registered ISWC, compositions with similar titles, and alternate versions create low-confidence matching; implement manual review queue for uncertain attribution before royalty payment

CRB STREAMING MECHANICAL RATE CURRENT VALIDATION: Automated mechanical royalty calculation for US streaming must apply current Copyright Royalty Board (CRB) Phonorecords IV rate structure; CRB rates have been subject to appeal and revision; automated rate application without current CRB rate validation creates compliance and payment accuracy exposure

CO-WRITER SPLIT DISPUTE RESOLUTION: Automated royalty split payment to co-writers requires resolved and documented percentage splits; automated payment with disputed splits (unresolved co-writer credit dispute, pending composition registration correction) creates payment to potentially incorrect rights holders; implement split dispute flag check before automated royalty disbursement

NEIGHBORING RIGHTS TERRITORY REGISTRATION LAP: Kobalt neighboring rights collection for master recordings requires territory-by-territory registration with collective management organizations (CMOs); unregistered territories receive no neighboring rights collection; automated neighboring rights reporting must track registration status per territory to identify collection gaps

SYNC LICENSE TERM AND FEE ACCURACY FOR PLACEMENT: Automated sync license issuance via Kobalt for composition placement in advertising, film, or TV must include accurate territory, term, and media use restrictions; automated license issuance with incorrect territory or use restrictions creates license infringement and publisher liability for unlicensed usage beyond license scope
agent_readiness.security_notes: Music publishing administration. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Songwriter royalty, catalog, and rights holder financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Music royalty platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Songwriter, catalog, and royalty financial data.
